extDescription.message: Save and switch site login sessions via cookie snapshots. Optional paid plan (account on your backend) unlocks higher limits.

emptyProfiles.message: No profiles yet. Open a site, enter a name, and click Save.

placeholderNewName.message: Name for this tab’s login state

confirmClearSiteCookies.message: This clears cookies for $1 in this browser — you’ll usually be signed out. Continue?

clearSiteCookiesSomeFailed.message: ($1 could not be removed, e.g. partitioned cookies.)

languageHint.message: By default the UI follows your browser language. You can pin English or Simplified Chinese; this page updates immediately when you change it.

lead.message: Cookie-based session snapshots stay on this device. Grant per-site access when prompted. Some sites may require additional storage beyond cookies to fully switch accounts.

filterSitesPlaceholder.message: Search site name, host, or URL…

sitesFilterNoMatch.message: No sites match the current filters.

accountApiFineprint.message: Sign in or create an account to upgrade to Pro.

proBenefitFreeLimit.message: Free plan stores up to 5 account snapshots.

proBenefitUnlimited.message: Pro unlocks unlimited snapshots and unlimited groups.

proBenefitDevices.message: A Pro account can bind up to 3 devices (browsers) at the same time.

proBenefitPrice.message: One-time ¥5 CNY (see in-extension copy for details).

proBenefitPrivacy.message: Data still lives in your local browser storage.

accountOfflinePayHint.message: Offline channel: follow the offline payment instructions, then contact the administrator to confirm the transfer.

accountPayQrHint.message: Open this link or QR on your phone to pay. Then use “Check payment” until the order is paid.

accountAlipayPageHint.message: Click the button below to open Alipay checkout. After paying, return here and click "Check payment" until the order is marked as Paid.

accountPayWaitingHint.message: Payment page opened in a new tab. This page will refresh automatically once payment completes—no need to do anything else.

accountAlipayPopupBlocked.message: The browser blocked the Alipay window. Please allow popups on this page and try again.

accountEnvMissing.message: Build is missing VITE_API_BASE_URL or VITE_EXTENSION_PRODUCT_KEY. Add a .env file and rebuild.

entitlementNeedBind.message: You have an active subscription — bind this device to unlock Pro on this browser.

entitlementDeviceLimit.message: Device limit reached for your plan. Unbind another device in the admin console or upgrade.

accountPollTimeout.message: Not paid yet or timed out. Try “Check payment” again later.

hostFineprint.message: The extension only reads/writes cookies for origins you allow. Saving or switching on a site will prompt for that origin. You can pre-grant broad access below (stronger privilege — explain clearly in store listing).

noneGranted.message: None recorded yet (granted when you save/switch).

profileEmpty.message: No sites yet. Open the extension popup on a tab to save the current login state.

hostPermissionDenied.message: Host permission not granted; URL not updated.

groupLimitAlert.message: Group limit reached on free plan.

confirmDeleteGroup.message: Delete group "$1"? Profiles stay; their group will clear.

backupFineprint.message: Export includes cookie snapshots — store the file safely.

errNoHttpTab.message: No active HTTP(S) tab. Open a web page first.

errHostDeniedSave.message: Host permission was not granted. Allow access to save cookies for this site.

errProfileLimit.message: Profile limit reached ($1 on free plan). Upgrade your account or remove profiles.

errHostDeniedSwitch.message: Host permission is required to switch cookies for this site.

errUnsupportedBackup.message: Unsupported backup version or missing fields.

confirmBulkDeleteProfiles.message: Delete the $1 selected profile(s)? This cannot be undone.

accountAutoBoundHint.message: This device has been bound automatically.
